column2: Act as an expert in Explainable AI (XAI), data science, behavioral psychology, and marketing & sales strategy.
Evaluate and quantify the propensity of a customer to purchase a next‑generation electric scooter.

Develop and optimize a personalized sales and marketing strategy for electric scooters, targeting customer segments with high purchase propensity as identified by a custom XAI‑enabled machine‑learning model. The strategy must tailor commercial hooks, psychological drivers, messaging, and communication channels to maximize sales conversion and revenue uplift.

Your outputs must be delivered in JSON format, using a clear and logical structure suitable for downstream automation. Use the infomration provided by general context, features context and business context
Keep in memory all the informations, write some ieda of copy for the marketing team
